name: Barbed Wire Fence Section
prompt:
Vietnam War era barbed wire fence section. Standard perimeter fencing using metal stakes and barbed wire.

Physical structure:
- Posts: 3 metal angle-iron picket stakes, ~1.5m tall
  - Y-shaped top for wire support
  - Driven into ground at ~2m spacing
  - Total section ~4m wide
- Wire: 3 horizontal runs of barbed wire
  - At heights: 0.4m, 0.8m, 1.2m
  - Each wire: thin cylinder connecting posts
  - Slight sag between posts
- Barbs: too small to model individually at this budget
  - Wire uses metallic shiny material to suggest barbed wire

Colors: Rusty wire (0x8a7060 with metalness 0.6), dark posts (0x555555), rust (0x7a5540)
Orientation: Fence runs along X axis
Scale: Real-world meters (~4m wide section, ~1.5m tall)
